name: Chrome Control
description: Drive your real Chrome browser with AI — tabs, navigation, screenshots, AX-tree reads, clicks, typing, and JS evaluation via a local extension over a loopback WebSocket

configSchema.label: Loopback WebSocket Port
configSchema.description: Port the gateway listens on (127.0.0.1 only). The extension must use this port.

configSchema.label: Max Screenshot Width
configSchema.description: Screenshots wider than this are downscaled before being sent to the agent.
